title: Fix always_comb ignoring textual statement order

features.name: always_comb read before write variable access
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a variable is read in an expression before being assigned a new value later in the same block

features.name: always_comb textual statement order semantics
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with multiple blocking assignments where later assignments must not affect earlier read values per IEEE 1800-2017 §9.2.2.2

features.name: always_comb variable forwarded from previous evaluation
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where an accumulator variable is read first to capture its previous-evaluation value, then assigned a new value
